meaning: adj.懦弱的,胆小的,优柔寡断的
examples: The pusillanimous elephant ran away at the sight of the mouse.
His failure to help the old man who was being robbed was pusillanimous.
Pusillanimous managers complain that they're forced to make these cuts by short-term oriented investors.
Meanwhile Mr Maliki, no longer considered weak and pusillanimous, has continued to strengthen his own position.
Shareholders might want to write their pusillanimous representatives in Congress about that.
